utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now, checking the final package:
1. destination – fully specified (city and country). ✅
2. travel_dates – fully specified (exact dates). ✅
3. transportation – includes airline, airports, flight class, cost, currency, baggage info, all required details. ✅
4. accommodation – includes property name, type, star rating, guest rating, location, cost, currency, amenities; fully specified. ✅
5. activities – includes name, duration, cost, currency, guide info; fully specified. ✅
6. additional_services – includes travel insurance and payment method, but lacks explicit cost. The format requires 'any extra services with costs'; since no cost is given, it’s incomplete. ❌
7. total_budget – includes total cost, budget remaining, currency; fully specified. ✅
Therefore, 6 out of 7 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes Lisbon (destination), airline_option3 in Economy class, property_option2 (a 3-star hotel in city center), City Walking Tour and Zoo Visit as activities, and restaurant_option3 for dining. From the ground-truth data: (1) Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 8. (2) Economy Class on a standard airline has a rating of 7. (3) property_option2 matches a mid-range 3-star city center hotel, similar to 'Cityscape Hotel' with rating 8. (4) The activities 'City Walking Tour' and 'Zoo' have ratings of 9 and 9 respectively. (5) restaurant_option3 offers local/vegetarian/vegan/gluten-free options, most similar to 'Organic Farm-to-Table' (healthy, family-friendly) with a rating of 8.
